data.description:
Replace the llm-review job steps in plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml with the single classifier-driven bash step. Must land in same commit as Task 2b47-043d (test rewrite).

## File Impact
### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml

## Change

Replace the llm-review job's steps block (currently contains claude-code-action and DSO_LLM_TIER validation) with:

```yaml
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run LLM review
        env:
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          # Do NOT set CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT — runner self-resolves _PLUGIN_ROOT from BASH_SOURCE
        run: |
          # DSO_LLM_TIER is deprecated; tier is now selected automatically by the classifier
          gh pr diff | bash plugins/dso/scripts/ci-llm-review-runner.sh
```

IMPORTANT: Use bare path 'bash plugins/dso/scripts/ci-llm-review-runner.sh' — NOT '$GITHUB_WORKSPACE/...' prefix. This matches the established convention in all existing workflow files (e.g., ticket-lifecycle.yml, ci.yml) and preserves the test_no_dso_plugin_refs assertion in test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh (no CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT in env block).

## GREEN verify (after committing alongside Task 2b47-043d)
bash tests/scripts/test-batched.sh --runner=bash --test-dir=tests/scripts --filter=test-ci-llm-review-job.sh
bash tests/scripts/test-batched.sh --runner=bash --test-dir=tests/scripts --filter=test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh
data.title: [UPDATE] Update plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml: classifier-driven llm-review job
